title: run_verify --impacted / --impacted-from-git: level-1 suites for changed files
action: Per CONTEXT D4 + plan-check P1-1/P1-4. Add to scripts/run_verify.mjs: --impacted <f1,f2,...> (repeatable/comma) and --impacted-from-git. CRITICAL (P1-4): --impacted-from-git enumerates changed files as the UNION of (a) staged + unstaged tree changes — git status --porcelain or git diff HEAD --name-only, so a staged-but-uncommitted merge (bee worktree merge runs the gate exactly in that state) yields its full file set — and (b) committed diff against merge-base with main/origin-main. Map through the registry (load scripts/impact-registry.json when fresh; on staleness rebuild in memory with a one-line warning); a changed test_*.mjs suite always selects itself; selection flows through the existing exact-path branch of the --only pipeline. Loud 'IMPACTED RUN: N suite(s) from K changed file(s)' banner before results and in summary; unmapped changed files listed by name; zero impacted => exit 0 with loud 'IMPACTED RUN: 0 suites — full verify delegated to CI'. --impacted xor --only (typed refusal). SUITES export/discovery untouched. P1-1: this cell changes run_verify's closure AND adds a new discovered suite — finish by re-running node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --write and committing the refreshed registry; --check green is part of this cell's verify. Test scripts/test_run_verify_impacted.mjs (spawn style of test_run_verify_only.mjs): mapped-file selection, self-selecting changed suite, unmapped listing, zero-impacted loud pass, mutual-exclusion refusal, and a staged-only change (git add without commit in a fixture repo) being picked up.

truths: IMPACTED banner + unmapped listing, nothing silent
zero impacted = loud pass naming CI
SUITES export/discovery byte-compatible for the manifest guard

verify: node scripts/test_run_verify_impacted.mjs && node scripts/test_run_verify_only.mjs && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check

trace.outcome: run_verify gained --impacted/--impacted-from-git: registry-backed exact-label selection, staged+unstaged+merge-base union (P1-4), IMPACTED banner, unmapped listing, zero=loud CI-delegating pass, xor --only refusal; registry re-derived
trace.verify_command: node scripts/test_run_verify_impacted.mjs && node scripts/test_run_verify_only.mjs && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check
